# Rizz Jobs

> India's premier platform for government job notifications, IPL cricket live scores, and Indian financial news.

Rizz Jobs (https://rizzjobs.in) aggregates and enriches government exam notifications from official Indian portals (UPSC, SSC, IBPS, EmploymentNews), provides real-time IPL 2026 cricket coverage via Cricbuzz, and publishes authoritative Indian financial news across six categories. All data is sourced from official government portals (.gov.in, .nic.in) and verified before publication.

## Government Job Notifications

- Job listings hub: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs
- Banking jobs: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/banking
- Railway jobs: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/railway
- Defense / Police: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/defense-police
- UPSC / SSC: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/upsc-ssc
- Teaching jobs: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/teaching
- Engineering jobs: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/engineering
- Medical jobs: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/medical
- PSU jobs: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/psu
- State jobs: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/state-jobs
- 10th / 12th pass jobs: https://rizzjobs.in/jobs/10th-12th-pass

Each job notification page at /exam/{slug} contains: vacancy count and post-wise breakdown, eligibility criteria (education, age, experience), application fee by category (General/OBC/SC/ST/EWS), selection process, important dates, step-by-step how-to-apply instructions, and frequently asked questions.

Exam dates and deadlines are in YYYY-MM-DD format (IST timezone).

## Cricket / IPL 2026

Real-time IPL 2026 coverage powered by Cricbuzz:
- IPL hub: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl
- Live scores: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/live
- Points table: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl/points-table
- Match schedule: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl/schedule
- Orange Cap (batting leaders): https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl/orange-cap
- Purple Cap (bowling leaders): https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl/purple-cap
- IPL news: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl/news
- All IPL teams: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl/teams
- Match detail (live + scorecard): https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl/match/{matchId}
- Match commentary: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl/match/{matchId}/commentary
- Player profiles: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/ipl/players/{playerId}
- International rankings: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/rankings
- Cricket records: https://rizzjobs.in/cricket/records

IPL 2026 teams: Mumbai Indians, Chennai Super Kings, Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Kolkata Knight Riders, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Delhi Capitals, Punjab Kings, Rajasthan Royals, Lucknow Super Giants, Gujarat Titans.

## Financial News

Indian financial and business news updated 4 times daily (sourced from Economic Times, Moneycontrol, Live Mint, Business Standard, NDTV Profit):
- News hub: https://rizzjobs.in/news
- Finance (banking, RBI policy, mutual funds, personal finance): https://rizzjobs.in/news/finance
- Business (corporate earnings, M&A, CEO news): https://rizzjobs.in/news/business
- Markets (Nifty, Sensex, IPO, F&O, commodity): https://rizzjobs.in/news/markets
- Economy (GDP, inflation, budget, trade balance): https://rizzjobs.in/news/economy
- Startups (funding rounds, unicorns, VC/PE deals): https://rizzjobs.in/news/startups

Each article includes full body content, key takeaways, topic tags, and estimated read time.

## Sitemaps

- Full sitemap: https://rizzjobs.in/sitemap.xml

## About

- About: https://rizzjobs.in/about
- Contact: https://rizzjobs.in/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://rizzjobs.in/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://rizzjobs.in/terms
